items.definition_en: A pan is a round metal dish for cooking food.
items.example_en: She put the eggs in a pan.

items.definition_en: A pot is a deep round container used for cooking food.
items.example_en: Soup is boiling in the pot.

items.definition_en: A knife is a tool for cutting food.
items.example_en: Please use a knife to cut the bread.

items.definition_en: A fork is a tool with points used to eat food.
items.example_en: He picked up his food with a fork.

items.definition_en: A spoon is a tool used to eat liquid food.
items.example_en: She stirred her tea with a spoon.

items.definition_en: A plate is a flat dish you eat from.
items.example_en: He put some pasta on his plate.

items.definition_en: A bowl is a deep round dish used for food.
items.example_en: She ate soup from a bowl.

items.definition_en: An oven is a machine for baking or roasting food.
items.example_en: He put the chicken in the oven.

items.definition_en: A stove is a machine that cooks food using heat.
items.example_en: She cooked dinner on the stove.

items.definition_en: A recipe tells you how to cook a dish.
items.example_en: I followed a recipe to make a cake.

items.definition_en: A chef is a person who cooks food professionally.
items.example_en: The chef prepared a special meal.

items.definition_en: An ingredient is something you use to make food.
items.example_en: Sugar is an ingredient in many cakes.

items.definition_en: A dish is a type of food prepared in a particular way.
items.example_en: Pizza is a popular Italian dish.

items.definition_en: A grill is a device for cooking food over fire or heat.
items.example_en: We cooked the meat on the grill.

items.definition_en: An apron is a piece of clothing that keeps your clothes clean when you cook.
items.example_en: She wore an apron while baking bread.

items.definition_en: A spice is something you add to food to make it taste better.
items.example_en: Cinnamon is a common spice in baking.

items.definition_en: A cutting board is a flat board you use to cut food.
items.example_en: Chop the onions on the cutting board.

items.definition_en: Cook is a person who cooks food.
items.example_en: The cook prepared a special meal.
